message:
Add browser/WKWebView tabs alongside terminal tabs

Add TabKind enum (.terminal, .browser) to TerminalTab. Browser tabs
render a WKWebView with URL bar, back/forward/reload controls.
Thumbnail views capture WKWebView snapshots for live previews.

- TerminalTab: surfaceTree now optional, add url/webView/iconName
- BrowserTabView: NSViewRepresentable WKWebView + URL bar
- TabContentView: dispatch on tab.kind
- SessionManager: add createBrowserTab()
- NewSessionMenu: add "New Browser Tab" option
- Both thumbnail views: WKWebView.takeSnapshot for browser previews
